<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="docs/src/validator_operator/validator_compose.rst" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-rst-code-docs-src-validator-operator-validator-compose-yaml-347" location="lines:347-357" -->
```yaml
   services:
     validator:
       environment:
          - |
             ADDITIONAL_CONFIG_AUTO_ACCEPT_TRANSFERS=
               canton.validator-apps.validator_backend.auto-accept-transfers {
                 "<receiverPartyId>" {
                   from-parties = ["<senderPartyId1>", "<senderPartyId2>"]
                 }
               }

```
